key_quote: Moment closure approximations for stochastic species can introduce systematic bias for bimodal distributions (bistable switches), and the system lacks articulated criteria for detecting when closure is inadequate.
rationale: Reviewers acknowledge the AI-guided CEGAR approach for synbio as novel. The blockers are all technical depth issues: uncharacterized δ-ε relationship, interpolant extraction reliability, moment closure bias detection, insufficient GNN training data, and compositional verification limitations at bifurcation points. Category B: novel idea with execution gaps.
